headline: MGM (MGM) Up 10.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: MGM (MGM) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Billionaire Fertitta Gambles on Caesar’s in Debt-Laden, $17.6 Billion Deal
summary: Analysts at Jefferies wrote Thursday that the closure of the Tillman deal could “act as a catalyst” for more M&A in the gambling sector.
